mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM (SELECT 1 AS ID , '제목 1' AS TITLE , '내용 1' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS ID , '제목 2' AS TITLE , '내용 2' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS ID , '제목 4' AS TITLE , '내용 4' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS ID , '제목 5' AS TITLE , '내용 6' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS ID , '제목 10' AS TITLE , '내용 10' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS ID , '제목 10' AS TITLE , '내용 10' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 11 AS ID , '제목 11' AS TITLE , '내용 11' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 19 AS ID , '제목 19' AS TITLE , '내용 19' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 20 AS ID , '제목 20' AS TITLE , '내용 20' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 21 AS ID , '제목 21' AS TITLE , '내용 21' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 25 AS ID , '제목 25' AS TITLE , '내용 25' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 29 AS ID , '제목 29' AS TITLE , '내용 29' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 49 AS ID , '제목 49' AS TITLE , '내용 49' AS CONTENT FROM DUAL) A WHERE 1=1
AND A.ID = #{condition.id}
AND A.TITLE LIKE concat('%', #{condition.title}, '%')
AND A.CONTENT LIKE concat('%', #{condition.content}, '%')
